message:
Refactor: simplify path matching, dedup batch pagination, rewrite README

- PathSegment: objects → primitives (string | number), '*' = wildcard
- Unify matchSegment + isPathSkipped + matchSubscription → single matchPath()
- Extract readBatchPaginated() to dedup array/object batch reading
- Add Uint8Array fast-path in EventParser feed (skip string conversion)
- ptReset: reuse arrays with .length = 0 instead of re-creating
- off(): simplified path comparison (primitives compare with ===)
- README: restructured around "The Problem" / "The Fix" / "Usage" by scenario
